title: Modelmeter Pricing Snapshot
description: Versioned pricing data for AI models. All monetary values are USD per million tokens (per Mtok).

snapshot_date.description: ISO date the snapshot represents (not the date a price was last verified).

id.description: Stable identifier: provider/model. Used as the API param.

input_cost_per_mtok.description: USD per 1M input tokens. null = not yet verified.

output_cost_per_mtok.description: USD per 1M output tokens. null = not yet verified.

cache_write_cost_per_mtok.description: USD per 1M tokens written to prompt cache. null if not applicable or unverified.

cache_read_cost_per_mtok.description: USD per 1M tokens read from prompt cache. null if not applicable or unverified.

last_verified.description: ISO date a human last confirmed these values match the source page.

verification_required.description: true means a human has NOT confirmed any values in this entry yet. Calculators should refuse to return results for entries marked true.

deprecated_on.description: ISO date the provider deprecated this model, or null if still available.
